title: ochna monantha
intro: Ochna monantha, also known as the one-flowered ochna, is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Ochna monantha is often used in infusions, decoctions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
